title: State Bank of India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: State Bank of India Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Madurai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
